CHECKLIST / MODULE 6 / LESSON 3: WEBINAR DRESS REHEARSAL
WEBINAR DRESS REHEARSAL
CHECKLIST
The day before your webinar, do a dress-rehearsal live on the platform you’ll
be hosting the webinar on. All parties involved should attend (you, your
guest(s), support person(s)), with someone logging in via mobile and
someone via desktop/laptop to test the user experience.
Here’s what you want to test during your dress rehearsal:
✓ 	Mics
✓ 	Screenshare
✓ 	Live video
✓ 	Chat functionality
✓ 	Taking questions via chat
✓ 	Taking questions via voice
✓ 	Recording
✓ 	Recording playbacks
✓ 	Download(s) offered
✓ 	Sales page
✓ 	Full funnel
✓ 	Countdown timers
✓ 	Links (clickable or otherwise)
✓ 	Putting the links on the screen
✓ 	Rehearse the offer, word for word, from the pivot to webinar close, and
record it and watch it again
If this is your very first webinar, or first webinar with new technology, you may
need another dress rehearsal in addition to this one.
